titleEn: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
titleZh: OpenAI 提升前沿 LLM 的指令层级能力
summaryEn: OpenAI introduced IH-Challenge to train frontier models to respect instruction hierarchy more reliably, improving steerability and resistance to prompt injection.
summaryZh: OpenAI 发布 IH-Challenge，核心是让模型更清楚地区分高可信与低可信指令，从而增强安全可控性，并提升对 prompt injection 的抵抗力。

titleEn: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
titleZh: ChatGPT 上线更适合学习数理的交互式讲解
summaryEn: ChatGPT is adding more interactive visual explanations for math and science, pushing the product closer to a hands-on learning tool rather than a text-only tutor.
summaryZh: OpenAI 把数学和科学学习做得更“可视化”了：用户可以动态查看公式、变量和推导关系，方向上更像互动式教具，而不是纯文本问答。

titleEn: How NVIDIA Builds Open Data for AI
titleZh: NVIDIA 解释如何构建面向 AI 的开放数据
summaryEn: This Hugging Face post looks at how NVIDIA approaches open data for AI, with useful takeaways on data engineering, quality, and ecosystem collaboration.
summaryZh: 这篇 Hugging Face 文章聚焦 NVIDIA 如何建设可复用、可扩展的开放数据体系。对训练数据工程、数据质量治理和生态协作都很有参考价值。

titleEn: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
titleZh: Gemini 在 Google Sheets 中拿到 SOTA 表现
summaryEn: Google is positioning Gemini in Sheets as a stronger natural-language interface for spreadsheet editing and analysis, pushing office AI toward more agentic workflows.
summaryZh: Google 强化了 Gemini 在 Sheets 里的能力，不只是补全表格，而是朝“自然语言驱动的数据分析与编辑”继续推进，办公场景里的 AI agent 味道更浓了。

titleEn: The era of “AI as text” is over. Execution is the new interface.
titleZh: GitHub：AI 不再只是文本接口，执行才是新界面
summaryEn: GitHub argues that the next AI interface is execution, not just chat, and frames the Copilot SDK as infrastructure for embedding agentic workflows into software.
summaryZh: GitHub 的判断很直接：下一阶段 AI 产品不该停留在聊天框，而要进入“可执行”的工作流。Copilot SDK 正在把 agent 能力嵌进应用本身。

titleEn: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
titleZh: 16 个开源 RL 库给出的经验：让 token 持续流动
summaryEn: A survey of 16 open-source RL libraries surfaces practical lessons on async training, throughput, and systems tradeoffs—useful for teams building training infrastructure.
summaryZh: 这篇文章总结了 16 个开源强化学习库的实现经验，重点落在异步训练、吞吐优化和工程权衡上，对训练侧开发者很有参考意义。

titleEn: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
titleZh: Hugging Face Hub 推出 Storage Buckets
summaryEn: Storage Buckets signal Hugging Face’s move further down the stack, evolving from model hosting toward broader infrastructure for AI teams.
summaryZh: Hugging Face 正在补齐更底层的存储能力。Storage Buckets 说明它不仅是模型托管平台，也在向完整 AI 开发生态基础设施继续延伸。

titleEn: AI should help us produce better code
titleZh: Simon Willison：AI 应该帮助我们写出更好的代码
summaryEn: Simon Willison argues that coding agents should raise code quality, not lower it—if quality drops, teams need to fix the process instead of normalizing bad outcomes.
summaryZh: Simon 的核心观点不是“别用 AI 写代码”，而是如果引入 agent 后代码质量变差，就该正面改造流程、评审和反馈机制，而不是默认接受质量下滑。

titleEn: Granite 4.0 1B Speech: Compact, Multilingual, and Built for the Edge
titleZh: IBM Granite 4.0 1B Speech：面向边缘设备的紧凑多语音模型
summaryEn: IBM’s Granite 4.0 1B Speech highlights the growing importance of compact multilingual speech models that can run closer to the edge.
summaryZh: Granite 4.0 1B Speech 继续体现一个明显趋势：更小、更轻、更适合边缘部署的多语音模型正在变得越来越实用。

titleEn: Under the hood: Security architecture of GitHub Agentic Workflows
titleZh: GitHub 拆解 Agentic Workflows 的安全架构
summaryEn: GitHub’s breakdown of Agentic Workflows security focuses on isolation, constrained outputs, and traceability—practical concerns for putting agents into production.
summaryZh: 这篇文章把 agent 工作流的安全重点讲得很实：隔离、受限输出、日志可追踪。对任何想把 agent 真正放进生产环境的团队都值得看。

titleEn: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
titleZh: OpenAI 将收购 AI 安全平台 Promptfoo
summaryEn: OpenAI’s planned Promptfoo acquisition suggests AI security and evaluation tooling are becoming a more strategic part of the development stack.
summaryZh: OpenAI 收购 Promptfoo，说明模型安全与评测能力正在进一步前置到开发流程里，安全 tooling 的战略价值明显上升。

titleEn: NVIDIA AI Releases Nemotron-Terminal: A Systematic Data Engineering Pipeline for Scaling LLM Terminal Agents
titleZh: NVIDIA 发布 Nemotron-Terminal，瞄准终端 Agent 的数据工程流水线
summaryEn: NVIDIA’s Nemotron-Terminal stands out less for model branding and more for its data-engineering pipeline aimed at training capable terminal agents.
summaryZh: Nemotron-Terminal 的重点不只是模型本身，而是围绕终端 agent 训练的数据工程方法。这类“把 agent 训练流程产品化”的方向值得持续关注。
